name: BlueKCCommonRightFaxAPIJobIDStsUpdate

text.value: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_CommTrnsmsnOwner}.ADFTMP_BlueKCCommonRightFaxAPIJobIDStsUpdate; SELECT @{pipeline().parameters.COMM_SK} AS COMM_SK, 'RGHTFAX' AS COMM_SRC_SYS_CD, 'COMMTRNSMSN' AS COMM_TRGT_SYS_CD, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(@{pipeline().parameters.JobIDStatus}) = '' THEN 'FAILED' WHEN dbo.trim_default(@{pipeline().parameters.JobIDStatus}) = 'Succeeded' THEN 'SUCCESS' WHEN dbo.trim_default(@{pipeline().parameters.JobIDStatus}) = 'https' THEN 'FAILED' ELSE UPPER(dbo.trim_default(@{pipeline().parameters.JobIDStatus})) END AS COMM_STTUS_CD, 'FAXSTS' AS COMM_TYP_CD, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(@{pipeline().parameters.JobIDStatus}) = '' THEN 'Fax Failed' WHEN dbo.trim_default(@{pipeline().parameters.JobIDStatus}) = 'Succeeded' THEN 'Fax Successful' WHEN dbo.trim_default(@{pipeline().parameters.JobIDStatus}) = 'https' THEN 'Fax Failed with https Error' WHEN dbo.trim_default(@{pipeline().parameters.StatusText}) = '' THEN 'No Fax Status Text' ELSE SUBSTRING(dbo.trim_default(@{pipeline().parameters.StatusText}),1,500) END AS COMM_STTUS_CMNT_TX, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS LAST_UPDT_DTM, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS COMM_SENT_DTM INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_CommTrnsmsnOwner}.ADFTMP_BlueKCCommonRightFaxAPIJobIDStsUpdate
